prestazioni: Engine swap to a 20V turbocharged 1.8T (engine code: **AGU** or **AWP**) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83mm, 8.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Tial MV-R 38mm external wastegate** for precise boost control (target: 1.2 bar / 17.4 psi).

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ engine build** including **Schrick 264° camshafts**, **Ferrea 6000-series valves**, **Supertech valve springs/retainers**, and a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a **Scorpion 76mm rear section** and **Milltek Sport 4-2-1 headers** for optimized scavenging.

Chassis reinforcement with **034 Motorsport X-Brace (B4 platform-specific)**, **H&R RS Coilovers (B4-specific, 30mm drop)**, **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm)**, and **AP Racing 4-piston front calipers (330mm rotors)** paired with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for track-capable stopping power.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning B4 Avant widebody kit** (OEM+ fitment, 30mm flares per side) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (Rieger-style)** and **rear diffuser (3D-printed ABS, 3-piece design)** for aggressive stance and aero balance.

**OEM+ Euro-spec B4 Avant headlight conversion (DE-style clear lenses)** with **Hella E-Code projectors (H4, 55W)** and **Morimoto XB LED bulbs (5000K)** for modernized lighting, paired with **Genuine Audi S2 Avant taillights (smoked reflectors)** for a retro-futuristic look.

**BBS RS-GT 17x8.5 ET35 wheels (80 Avant-specific offsets)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (225/40/17)** with **custom center caps (Audi quattro script, anodized gold)** and **H&R Trak+10 wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for perfect flush fitment.
